changes.finding: Sprint creates one documentation audit file only: docs/audit-papers/FE-R4_patterns_layer_gate_and_implementation_decision.md. No executable code, no Intelligence Core interaction, no SSOT/pipeline/analytics files touched. CONTENT = non-executable data / docs-only (SOP §4). STANDARD is conservative for a docs-only sprint (LOW would also be valid) but no HIGH triggers apply — no Intelligence Core, no backend/ssot/, no pipeline files.

changes.field: Controlling authority files — all required files present
changes.finding: All mandatory authority files listed in the prompt's 'Read before doing anything' block exist in the repository. The two STOP-condition files (v6 recommendation paper and FE-R0 audit) are both present. All four optional 'inspect if present' files are also present.

changes.field: Cross-sprint guard test files — all present
changes.finding: All six regression guard test files named in the prompt's cross-sprint guard preflight block exist in the repository.

changes.field: v6 recommendation paper — Section 5 / Pattern layer content verified
changes.finding: The v6 paper's Section 5 content confirms FE-R4's scope is correct. Section 5 is explicitly Phase 2 (paper line 592: 'Phase 2 — existence check gate required before speccing'). Sprint R-7 in the paper (lines 1049-1068) directly maps to FE-R4: gate sprint, research/specification only, no implementation, produces GO/NO-GO/GO-WITH-CONDITIONS. The six required pattern contract fields (clinical name, subtitle, why-it-matters, supporting markers, severity/status, scientific classification) are confirmed in paper lines 382-395. Taxonomy classification types (phenotype, risk construct, syndrome/state, organ-pattern) confirmed in paper lines 329-339.
citations: docs/frontend/HealthIQ_Final_Results_Journey_Recommendation_Paper_v6.md line 52: 'pattern layer (Section 5) is partly grounded in current cluster/system implementation, but a fully governed phenotype-display layer... must be treated as Phase 2, gated behind an explicit existence check'
docs/frontend/HealthIQ_Final_Results_Journey_Recommendation_Paper_v6.md line 592: 'Patterns across your body | Phase 2 — existence check gate required before speccing'
docs/frontend/HealthIQ_Final_Results_Journey_Recommendation_Paper_v6.md lines 1049-1068: Sprint R-7 specification matches FE-R4 purpose exactly
